hero.headline: Your business, online. Done right.
hero.subheadline: I build websites and digital tools that help startups and companies attract clients, look professional, and grow. No agencies, no templates, no technical headaches.
hero.techBadges: Websites · AI Tools · Chatbots · Multilingual · Integrations · E-commerce
hero.capabilitiesTitle: What I can build for you:

whyMe.title: Why work with me instead of an agency?
whyMe.card1Title: You get a real website, not a template
whyMe.card1Desc: No drag-and-drop builders, no recycled designs. Your site is built from scratch to match your brand and your goals.
whyMe.card2Desc: From the homepage to the contact form to the checkout, I handle everything. No handoffs, no miscommunication, no surprises.
whyMe.card3Title: You talk to the person doing the work
whyMe.card3Desc: No account managers, no layers of bureaucracy. You reach me directly, get fast answers, and always know what's happening.
whyMe.card4Desc: Agencies charge for offices, idle staff, and overhead. You pay for actual work and get a better product as a result.

services.title: What I can build for you
services.s1Desc: A focused page that shows who you are and turns visitors into leads. Perfect for professionals, freelancers, and product launches.
services.s2Desc: A complete, professional website for your company: team page, services, contact forms, and optimized to show up on Google.
services.s3Desc: Sites built to convert: clear messaging, strong calls to action, and connected to your analytics and ad campaigns.
services.s4Desc: Reach customers in multiple languages and countries. Each version is adapted for its market and ranks on local Google results.
services.s5Desc: Add a smart assistant to your website that answers customer questions, qualifies leads, or automates support. Around the clock.
services.s6Desc: Connect your website to your CRM, payment system, or any tool you use. Automate the things that slow your team down.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.footnote: Development prices (one-time payment). The service requires a monthly fee for maintenance, monitoring, security, and hosting (domain name already included).
pricing.proFor: For small businesses, studios, and brands
pricing.customFor: For startups and companies with specific needs

contact.title: Let's talk about your project
contact.subtitle: Tell me what you need. I'll get back to you within 24 hours. No commitment required.
contact.messagePlaceholder: What do you need? Tell me about your project...
contact.success: Message sent! I'll be in touch within 24 hours.
contact.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

projects.title: Selected Work
projects.subtitle: A collection of bespoke digital products and websites built for startups, creators, and companies.
projects.moreComingDesc: I'm always building new digital products. Let's design and build yours next.

testimonials.title: What clients are saying
testimonials.subtitle: Real feedback and experiences from clients about the design and development process.
testimonials.sofiaQuote: Your service exceeded my expectations. Developing the concept was super easy, and you guided me every step of the way—the entire process was incredibly smooth. The website ended up with an aesthetic that truly represents me, with a simple, interactive, and easy-to-read design that I absolutely love. I believe it captures 100% of the studio's vision.
testimonials.moreComingDesc: Constantly adding new client feedback as projects are successfully completed.

meta.title: Web Development for Startups & Companies in Argentina
meta.description: I build websites, AI tools, and digital products that help businesses grow. No agencies, no templates. Fast, professional, and built to convert. Based in Argentina.
